what_it_does: TypeScript declaration file for the Switch component: declares a SwitchProps interface extending button HTMLAttributes (omitting onChange) with an optional checked boolean and an onChange callback (next: boolean, e: MouseEvent), and declares the Switch function plus a default export.
observations: onChange signature is (next: boolean, e: React.MouseEvent) => void — passes the toggled-to value plus the event
Doc comment: 'On/off switch. The track turns gold when checked (gold = active voice).'
standouts: The 'gold = active voice' note ties the switch's color semantics to a system-wide meaning convention
conventions: Omit-then-redefine onChange to override the native handler shape
JSDoc on the interface; default + named export
notes: Type contract for an on/off Switch rendered on a button; checked controls state, onChange emits the next boolean plus the event.
purpose_vs_actual: Match — declares exactly the props the .jsx implements (checked, onChange).
intention_signals: Gives the buildless Switch a typed surface with a boolean-next onChange so consumers get type-safe controlled-toggle usage.
contribution: Contributes the public type signature of the Switch toggle, including the checked prop and the (next, event) onChange contract over a button element.
summary_for_embedding: TypeScript declaration for an on/off Switch component on a button with a checked prop and a (next-boolean, event) onChange callback.
intention_for_embedding: To provide a typed contract for the design-system's on/off switch toggle.
